linkedin.text:
Your best salesperson just got a recruiter's DM. What's keeping them?

Finance always asks the same question about incentive travel: "What's the return?" Here's the honest answer.

Structured incentive programs are tied to up to 18% higher sales-team performance and markedly lower attrition among top performers. And losing a senior rep isn't cheap — replacing one can cost roughly 1.5x their salary once you factor in ramp time and lost pipeline.

So a well-produced reward trip isn't a perk on the expense line. It's a retention and revenue engine that earns back across the year. The catch: it only works if it's produced flawlessly — so the experience, not the invoice, is what your people remember. That's the part we own. From business to pleasure, we run the whole thing end to end.

Want the ROI model mapped to your headcount? Send us a message or book a call.

#IncentiveTravel #EmployeeRetention #CorporateEvents
